units.content: The reference observationally evaluates AlphaFold models on drug-binding-site prediction accuracy
The reference's approach is a post-hoc observational evaluation of model outputs
Claim 8a is a pre-registered architectural predictor operating from attribute-set arithmetic
Claim 8a is distinguished from this reference because claim 8a is a pre-registered architectural predictor from attribute-set arithmetic, not a post-hoc observational evaluation
